entry.title: A Shadow Of A Ghost
entry.summary:
Author: MysticRose1992

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 40,963Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 1,664

Summary: Danyal Al Ghul was the younger twin brother of Damian Al Ghul, and destined to be his brother’s right hand man, the ghost that whispered the secrets of others in his ear. Danyal was a dangerous foe to have, one that could look at you and know all of your secrets, one that could vanish right in front of you. So, it was both the saddest and the happiest day when Danyal Al Ghul and his guards disappeared, all thought to be dead, when he was ten.Danny Fenton was the quiet weird kid that the strange, eccentric Drs. Maddie and Jack Fenton found and adopted one day. He was deathly silent, and yet with one look from his piercing blue eyes he could silence you. Even with his weird aura around him, he managed to pull two of the only other weird kids into being his best friends. The three of them were inseparable and seemed to have developed their own silent communications.Danny is weirdly smart about certain things and yet seems to be failing his English class. Danny is forced to write an essay that just so happens to win his English class a week-long trip to Gotham. Surely nothing could go wrong with a group of teenagers from Amity Park and the two adults accompanying them in Gotham?

entry.title: Batman's Hunger
entry.summary:
Author: Lunar_Lukas

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,059Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 6

Summary: This was inspired by an idea one of my fav artists posted on their story - it's about a vampire Bruce Wayne (Batman) who feeds off of Clark Kent (Superman), because both parties were curious - but, Bruce finds out that Clark's blood has basically ruined any other type for him

entry.title: L’appel Du Vide
entry.summary:
Author: NyxieSpades27

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,855Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 12

Summary: L'appel Due Vide Human instincts can't always be trusted.We can be on the highest of grounds, our steps measured, our breath cutting short in fear. And as you look down, you can either embrace fear like a safe blanket, forbidding you to do anything illogical. Or you could succumb to the endless urge of letting go, accepting the dark pit below like one final hug —cold and painful— from death's welcoming arms.   The Justice League: The Greatest Heroes of the World, bring hope in salvation and faith of another waking day to the common civilians. But where does it come from? That...motivation to keep going? That small voice in their head which...they aren't able to recognize, yet sounds oh-so-familiar? Were they Dreams?Fantasies?Hallucinations? Or something as terrifying as memories?   — Also known as a story about a different timeline where our heroes' legacies and sidekicks were taken in by the wrong people at the perfect time.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.summary:

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,645Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 11

entry.title: All My Traitor Heart
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 68,439Chapters: 31/33Kudos: 13

Summary: Gotham, 1935. Bruce Malone is a private investigator with a shingle, a past he doesn't advertise, and a client who smells like jasmine and trouble in equal measure. Diana Prinkipas needs a treasure found. Clark Kent needs a job. Bruce needs to stop noticing things he has no business noticing. Nobody gets what they need. A noir in sixteen movements, one interrogation tape, and a coat button that costs twenty years.

entry.title: You can take the boy from the circus
entry.summary:
Author: Gotham_Blight

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 79,489Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 501

Summary: Damian Al-Ghul Wayne had everything at one point. He was a prince. Ibn al Xu'ffasch. Son of the bat. Heir to the demon. He had never asked to be ripped away from everything that he knew, from the warmth of his home, his culture, his palace in Nanda Parbat. He had never asked to be shipped to a gloomy, grey city. Even when his father kept taking in orphans and ruining his plans for inheritance, Damian stood steadfast. But then his father died, leaving behind his newest orphan. A tiny acrobat with watery blue eyes and black curls, who spoke no English. Damian knew the boy never asked to be ripped away from everything that he knew, from the warmth of his home, his culture, his circus troupe. Damian knew he needed to be there for him.

entry.title: Homecoming
entry.summary:
Author: Jayden_Jones (KoaKillianAZ)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,153Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 52

Summary: Richard Grayson doesn't hate his parents, he really doesn't. He loves them, he loves his father Clark and his mom Bruce, and he loves his siblings. But he needs time, time to think, time to define who he is. They had a fight, a very bad one, the worst they ever had, mama and papa really don't like the idea of him being a superhero, so he ran, he ran away from home. Robin is not dumb, he knows that his parents know where he is, apparently they are giving him time Now he is here, with this team, a team full of young superheroes, people who he loves, but who have no idea who he truly is. That doesn't matter anymore, because his little brother Jason just showed up in the Titans tower. Mama and Papa just went missing, and that means Robin has to go home ---- Or: What if the robin from the 2003 titans show was a superbat baby

entry.title: The cold boy that met the sun
entry.summary:
Author: Arachnophobic_SpiderMan

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,727Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 132

Summary: What happens when Alfred Pennyworth finds 15 years old Bruce Wayne's suicide plans ? What happens when Bruce Wayne runs away ? What happens when he finds himself in Smallville, Kansas, on the anniversary of his parent's murder ? He meets Clark Kent, that's what happens.orI need more of fics where Bruce and Clark meet as teenagers. Honestly i wrote this for myself. Tags may be added as the story goes fyi. Also english is very much not my first language and it shows, so no hate pls okayy? thanksss xx

entry.title: Mirror, Mirror…He Is Mine
entry.summary:
Author: WriterDMathis

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,216Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 2

Summary: The mirror reveals many truths: the beauty one carries, the fairness one possesses, reflected for all to see. But Bruce cannot bring himself to look; he casts no reflection, as if his very soul hides from the glass. Yet Clark sees him still—his shadowed being, dark and enigmatic, the fairest of all, needing no mirror to prove it.

entry.title: Space Puppy
entry.summary:
Author: remember_april_andbeglad

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,068Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 69

Summary: Bruce rests his head back onto Clark's chest, feeling the rise and fall of his breath, steady, the way the Earth orbits the sun. Clark is looking at him, pupils dilated, brilliant dopey grin on his face. His stupid curl falls in just the right way, dangling between his eyes. He looks like a puppy with those eyes, Bruce thinks to himself fondly. Space puppy. - Clark returns from an off-planet mission and misses more than just his yellow sun. Bruce decides the best way to express his feelings is by throwing obscene amounts of money and plans in Clark's general direction.

entry.title: How Long Has This Been Going On?
entry.summary:
Author: bigmouthstrikes_again

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,112Chapters: 6/10Kudos: 97

Summary: “On the roof. I know what it was,” The boy said. “What was it? What did you see?” Clark said, glancing around. “It was Death I think?” He replied. “Death? What does that mean?” “Death was watching,” John began matter of factly, raising a hand to point behind Clark, “Death was watching and he was looking at you.” Quickly, Clark whipped his head to look in the direction John was pointing. He turned just quickly enough to see a wisp of black disappear behind a building. OR Batman stalks the hell out of Superman. Bruce Wayne is intrigued by Clark Kent. Superman is horrified by Batman. Bumbling reporter Clark Kent can’t seem to figure Bruce Wayne out. Identity mishaps occur. Idea from @lescrenti ‘s TikTok!New chapter every other day

entry.title: Forced Perspective
entry.summary:
Author: unbreakabledawn

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,627Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 7

Summary: When unforeseen circumstances force Bruce into staying with Clark and Lois, Clark can look forward to finally seeing Lois and Bruce properly introduced. There's just one small problem. — “What is that?” Lois says curiously, pulling Clark out of his thoughts. “Bruce is, uh,” Clark stumbles over his words. He decides to just extend his hands instead in explanation, showing off his tiny charge.Lois blinks. It takes her a moment to even spot the tiny figure in his hands. Bruce doesn’t move a relative inch, arms hanging stiffly by his sides. Once comprehension dawns on her, her eyes widen in surprise. “Oh my god.” She presses her fingers to her mouth, but Clark can still see the shape of her smile peeking through. The small movement of Bruce crossing his arms across his chest draws Clark’s gaze down to him, but he can’t see Bruce’s expression from here. No doubt he’s wearing a fierce scowl.

entry.title: Losing a Child
entry.summary:
Author: Rain_nstuff

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,721Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 13

Summary: So this is post Jason's death and the confrontation with the Joker. I just changed it to being SuperBat.Bruce is struggling to cope afterwards for obvious reasons, he wants nothing to do with Clark in the moment, but Clark stays to make sure he's safe. He also tries to apologize for what happened and how it went down.Since Jason was a great kid, and everyone forgets that, I did some flashbacks... Mostly of them co-parenting. Anyways.It is Clark's POV, since I wanted to do something a little different.

entry.title: Family maybe?
entry.summary:
Author: E_fox_lady53799armor

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,136Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 33

Summary: Summary : After a long time searching about his biological family Jason Todd finds out that he has a cousin. And as if that weren’t enough he is supposed to be the kid that now got adopted by a Bruce.But something doesn’t add up. His scars. His movements, like he had to fight his entire life. And worst of all his eyes. They look like they have seen centuries but also like a calm water but too calm .———Percy Jackson two wars veteran trying to live his life after his mother’s death. But one day he meets a man that looks a lot like him but older and less divine (like Poseidon), but if he took those things aside… no that man can’t be..but..no..his father Poseidon had warned him that he might meet him, but he never thought it was possible… too much similarities!!!

entry.title: Risk Management
entry.summary:
Author: extradiegetic

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,952Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 40

Summary: After an evening at a gala takes an unexpected turn, Clark’s fling with billionaire playboy Bruce Wayne goes disastrously public. To make things weirder, people keep trying to talk with him about superheroes, which really aren’t his beat. He and Bruce hardly get along outside the bedroom, but they’ll have to work together to figure out what’s missing in their lives.

entry.title: My SuperBat NSFW art Collection/超蝙色色合集
entry.summary:
Author: MMYY_2025

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 331Chapters: 13/13Kudos: 421

Summary: Hi! I’m 咩咩鱼鱼 This is a collection of some of my SuperBat NSFW artworks.Please read the tags carefully before viewing to make sure you’re comfortable with the content. I’m a big fan of trans Bruce / cuntboy Bruce, so in my works Bruce has a vagina and Clark is well endowed.If that’s not your thing, please feel free to skip.   之前画的一些超蝙色色合集，基本都是cuntboy蝙注意避雷，以及我喜欢画阿黑颜高潮脸
